apiAuthentication.warningMessage: Some functionality will not be available until an authenticated session can be established. Please try logging in again in another window. If the issue persists, please contact support.

confirmationDialog.inputMismatch: Input does not match confirmation text

connectedApps.disconnectErrorMessage: There was a problem disconnecting app with client ID {clientId}. Please contact support if the problem persists.
connectedApps.disconnectSuccessMessage: App with client ID {clientId} was successfully disconnected.
connectedApps.title: Connected Apps

createdApps.deleteErrorMessage: There was a problem deleting app with client ID {clientId}.
createdApps.deleteExceptionMessage: There was a problem deleting app with client ID {clientId}: {error}.
createdApps.deleteSuccessMessage: App with client ID {clientId} was successfully deleted.
createdApps.title: OAuth Apps

dialog.copyError: Couldn't copy to clipboard. Try again manually.
dialog.createError: There was a problem while creating your application. Please, try again later or contact support.

validation.alphanumeric: The application name should only contain alphanumeric symbols.
validation.maxLength: The application name should be less than 100 symbols.

oauth.fetchError: There was a problem fetching your apps. Please, try again.

tags.checkOntologyFiles: Please check that the ontology files are correctly configured.
tags.noMatchingSuggestionsFromOntologies: No matching tag suggestions from ontologies.
tags.typeTagInstead: Simply type in the tag and press enter instead.
tags.useNewTagHint: To use a new tag, press Enter.

validation.tooShort: Tag must be at least {minLength} characters long.
validation.whitespaceConsecutive: Tags cannot contain consecutive whitespace characters.
validation.whitespacePrefix: Tags cannot start with whitespace characters.
validation.whitespaceSuffix: Tags cannot end with whitespace characters.

toolbar.displayingLockedVersion: Displaying version {version} of the document - this is locked for editing.
